Blade of Xalgoz  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 23 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +3 AGI: +3
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

▲ Page top
catnip
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2003 at 5:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257743941
Sage
78 posts
Somebody gave my lvl 6 frogger warrior this sword for the simple task of collecting a few spiderling silks...he has yet to let go of it some 13 lvls later. People can say this is better that or that is better than this, but if you've got it, and it's a helluva lot better than anything you'd otherwise have ot your level, why complain about it. Plus, it does look pretty awesome, especially on a frogger when he has to put his entire body into swinging that bad daddy. Wooof!

Edited, Sat Jun 14 06:01:58 2003
▲ Page top
Xalgoz Blade vs Abram's Axe of the Stoic
QuoteReply
# May 14 2003 at 2:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570718010
36 posts
Xalgoz Blade sux **** compared to Abram's Axe of the Stoic ( https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=4367 ) and on Saryrn i have seen Abram's for as low as 100p, becuase its so easy to get. Don't bother with Xalgoz Blade at all the stats suck nowa days.

53 posts
(i know im double posting but the point still stands here as well)
the first 150pp i made with my forggie warrior i used to buy a black enamled mace (30pp) a blade of xag... something (23/40,2hs 50pp)and a velium warsword...... 50pp.... my god i love the bazaar.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 18 2002 at 6:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) tis tis y would u ever want a babs. its so small as a warrior i want the biggest sword i can find. it suchs when u are a big race and u have a lil sword, makes u look weak! o about this sword i would go camp it i don't have a 2hs that any good. i use a ssoy in main and centi LS in offhand
RE: sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 3:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781449958
29 posts
I don't think you know how much better a BABS is than this do you? BABS weighs 2.5... This weighs 7, if you take three weight out for the +3Str. 23/40 on this versus 24/36 on BABS... And you chose this because it looks better? If you want looks, go for a Validus Custodius Two hander.
▲ Page top
RE: sword
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2002 at 10:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780463989
37 posts
why use this over a BABS? because of the damage bonus...BABS is 24/39, missing the damage bonus of 2handers with 40 delay or higher...this weapon, or better yet a dark edged 2hander (the weight is killer, but the stats rock too) are both superior to a BABS in that respect...and the damage bonus easily makes up for the 1 point of damage and delay that the BABS has...oh yeah, and Dark edged 2handers look Bad-***, dunno about this, but if you want stats and looks, go with the dark-edged 2hander...you get over the 15 stone weight, and if you're a big race, it really doesn't matter...just my 2 cp
▲ Page top
RE: sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2006 at 6:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1633306622282
429 posts
Ok I know this is an old post but that is just plain retarded. 1 Real damage is > then the bonus damage from 1 delay. Plus on top of that babs is more dps because its faster. Overall I am disapointed that the sword off a lv 40 is worse then the sword off a lv 20 :o

I got this from a newbie who I had helped out by buying some stuff for him and a couple of months later, he gives this sword to me for free! Very nice upgarde from my Axe of frost although I still use it a bit.

Simply awesome
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2002 at 9:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254298366
9 posts
I traded for the BoX with an Axe of the Frost I had and have never looked back. This sword has helped me zoom through the low 30s on Luclin, where I was hitting for up to 70hp per blow and 130+ on double attack. May all you pallies have the good fortune to run across this piece because it's well worth having.

Mangard Faithmore
Paladin of 34 winters
Xegony server

logged on to my alt to do some selling and while at the bank in the bazaar someone /ooc'ed that he was giving away the BoX. I did not know what it was at the time but thought what the heck and told him i would take it and that was that. Wow nice sword cant wait to use it now.

Camping Fun
QuoteReply
# May 17 2002 at 1:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
Someone was camping Xalgoz for the staff - This sword kept dropping, so a nice fellow gave it to my alt, and non-twinked Iksar Warrior. No sweat off his back, he got the sword again on the next kill. It's lore, and all, so why not give it away.

Luck
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2002 at 9:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777616904
1 post
I had a warrior give me the BoX in Upper Guk for 50 pp. I almost fell over. He said he had been trying to get rid of it forever. Am I nuts? Is there a problem with this sword? I can't wait to hit 20 to see what dam it does for my Troll SK.

Lv 15 SK

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 30 2002 at 2:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) MY PARENTS ARE GETTING RID OF EQ! IT SUX! AAAHH!
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 22 2002 at 2:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hehe you won't be storming anyone by surprise if your folks kill your account....maybe in your dreams...~*~*~***Snoooooore.....I STORM JOOO!!!! ~*~*~*~*~*~
Good Blade for the Fashion Conscious
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2002 at 5:10 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250805840
28 posts
Yes, the BABS is indeed one point better in dmg and dly, but the BABS looks like a 2-handed dagger. It's kinda goofy if you ask me.

The Blade of Xalgoz however is long and wide, very cool looking. The +3STR IMO neutralizes the point of damage lost and the increased dex doesn't hurt.

IMO, looks are next to everything. How else are you going to sway a nice wood-elf lady? Are you gonna impres her with your little 2-handed dagger or this impressive looking piece of magic steel?

Edited, Fri Mar 29 05:07:18 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Good Blade for the Fashion Conscious
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2002 at 5:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251924332
Scholar
303 posts
I'll agree that this blade is very similiar to the BABS in actual damage done including the strength stats and the damage bonus. However, let us not forget that the BABS is extremely lightweight (hardly ever run low on stamina) and doubles as a light source for all those night-blind paladins out there. Given the good looks of this blade, it's a very close call which would probably come down to price and availability at the moment of purchase.
▲ Page top
RE: Good Blade for the Fashion Conscious
QuoteReply
# May 24 2002 at 5:20 PM Rating: Default
EnvyEyes
133 posts
You're more likely to impress that nice wood-elf lady swing a 2-hander, alright... but I'm not talking about a sword! =~)

I'll leave you to your imagination....

▲ Page top
not bad at all
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2002 at 5:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773736565
5 posts
A friend gave me this blade for my Ranger Suiko, although I may have actually had one on my warrior on Bristlebane, can't remember. It's pretty decent as far as damage, but I miss alot, even with a maxxed out (for my level) 2H slash. When I do land a thwack with it, it hits pretty hard, I was seeing dmg in the high 80's as a norm.
▲ Page top
nice blade
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 6:35 PM Rating: Decent

I got mine from a Bard in Lake of Ill Omen for 250pp. I got a really good deal. The damage bonus is 10 at level 43.

New Toy
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2002 at 12:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758149710
13 posts
I just picked one of these up last night on MT for 480pp, I slept with it under my pillow. It is a nice upgrade from my LoW. I can't wait to try it out on some gnolls in Paw.


Edited, Tue Mar 19 15:13:22 2002
▲ Page top
Hmmmm....
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2002 at 6:46 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Sage
76 posts
I traded a HQ bear pelt for one of these on my alt. server this morning...the guy who had it said he was tired of playing his warrior, and offered it and a Paineel BP to me for 2 HQ pelts.
I only had one at the time, so he took it, and gave me the BoX and the BP, and said to pay him the other skin later. Geeze...and I'd never seen or heard of either of them. I think I'll go see what the BP goes for. Somedays it just pays to get out of bed early to play EQ, I guess....

Update: While passing through Freeport with my half-elf warrior on my way to HHP,(on my home server, Quellious, ) I heard one being Auctioned,
and being of a naturally inquisitive nature, inquired after the price. His response was 175pp, and I immediately told him I was OMW to the bank, to stop auctioning it, it was sold. 8) So now both my warriors have this weapon, and I'm a very happy camper. The price seems to have come down by at least half, on my home server, anyway.

Edited, Mon Mar 4 13:50:14 2002
